name: code-archaeology
description: Git-archaeology skills. alibi: the detective who tells you WHY the code exists, not who to blame.

plugins.name: alibi
plugins.description: Recovers WHY a line of code exists: skips noise commits blame frames people with, finds the true origin commit, chases PRs and review threads, and rules JUSTIFIED / EXPIRED / COLD CASE. Also handles commit dossiers, regressions (bisect), incident traces, design rationale, and history-based repo tours.
